heading: Omitted
label: 1041h Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that no provision of this subchapter would be construed to affect any treaty to which a tribe referred to in this subchapter was a party, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 106–568, title VII, § 710114 Stat. 2916Dec. 27, 2000
